description: A vertical graphic. The top third is a photograph of President Trump seated at a desk signing a document, flanked by a young boy (left) and young girl (right) seated at small school desks, with a row of U.S. flags behind; the Presidential seal is visible on the desk front. The lower two-thirds is deep navy with a faint seal watermark. The large white headline reads 'The Education President', followed by a blue ribbon banner 'PRESIDENT TRUMP IS MAKING EDUCATION GREAT!'. Below is a two-column checkbox list in white caps: ESTABLISHED 7 AGENCY PARTNERSHIPS TO BREAK UP EDUCATION BUREAUCRACY; CHAMPIONED THE LARGEST FEDERAL EXPANSION OF EDUCATION FREEDOM IN HISTORY; AWARDED A RECORD $500 MILLION FOR CHARTER SCHOOLS; AWARDED $256 MILLION IN GRANTS TO IMPROVE LITERACY AND EXPAND SCHOOL CHOICE; DESIGNED THE WORKFORCE PELL GRANT PROGRAM TO SUPPORT HIGH-WAGE, SHORT-TERM EDUCATION OPPORTUNITIES; BROKERED LANDMARK DEALS TO RESTORE MERIT ON CAMPUSES; ROOTED OUT DEI IN AMERICA'S SCHOOLS; LAUNCHED THE FAFSA FORM EARLY; PREVENTED $1 BILLION IN STUDENT AID FRAUD; PROTECTED WOMEN'S SPORTS BY ENFORCING TITLE IX.
notable_text: The Education President; PRESIDENT TRUMP IS MAKING EDUCATION GREAT!; Awarded a record $500 million for charter schools; Rooted out DEI in America's schools; Prevented $1 billion in student aid fraud; Protected women's sports by enforcing Title IX
